ogTitle: Tarcoola Beach vs Tarin Rock: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tarcoola Beach and Tarin Rock.
heading: Tarcoola Beach vs Tarin Rock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tarcoola Beach, Western Australia and Tarin Rock, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tarcoola Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Tarin Rock (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tarcoola Beach or Tarin Rock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tarcoola Beach has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Tarin Rock scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tarcoola Beach scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Tarin Rock scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tarcoola Beach or Tarin Rock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tarcoola Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
